subcodes.first_line: The Call hath been raised from the Most Exalted Horizon, and they who dwelt on Sinai were thunderstruck in the Heaven of Knowledge, and cried out [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع الندآء من الافق الاعلی و انصعق الطوریون فی سیناء العرفان و صاحت
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @firmness in the Covenant, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
